title: The Cloud Ascent
lines: Your hands burn from the coarse hemp of the rope. You are deep inside a cold, grey mist that tastes of ozone and stagnant lightning.
Every muscle in your body screams as you haul yourself upward, dangling thousands of feet over an invisible world.
Suddenly, the mist breaks. Above you, the sky transitions back into a deep, velvet violet. You see the massive, curved undersides of 10 gargantuan zeppelins, moored together with golden chains.

options.desc: 1. Haul yourself onto the main zeppelin deck
2. Hang onto the rope and try to catch your breath
